name: Accelerated 5-Year Amortization for Small Insurance Companies

eligibility.description: Available to insurance companies with specified policy acquisition expenses under $10,000,000 for the taxable year; the $5,000,000 benefit phases out dollar-for-dollar for expenses between $10M and $15M.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows insurance companies to amortize the first $5,000,000 of specified policy acquisition expenses over 60 months instead of the standard 180 months.
